## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck` passes with zero errors
- [ ] `pnpm run build` completes successfully
- [ ] New API endpoints are documented in `docs/API.md`
- [ ] DB schema changes include a seed update in `lib/db/src/seed.ts`
- [ ] Sensitive data (keys, passwords, tokens) is handled via env vars only
